name: claude-code-empowerments
description: A personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins and skills — empowerments for everyday coding.

plugins.name: bitbucket-repo
plugins.description: Browse Bitbucket repositories — list repos, branches, commits, and read files at any ref.

plugins.name: bitbucket-pipeline
plugins.description: Manage Bitbucket CI/CD pipelines — list, inspect, trigger, and stop pipeline runs.

plugins.name: bitbucket-pr
plugins.description: Manage Bitbucket pull requests — list, view, create, update, review, merge, and comment.

plugins.name: jira-api
plugins.description: Jira REST API reference and prebuilt scripts for auth, search, issue CRUD, transitions, comments, sprints, and ADF format.

plugins.name: md-with-mermaid-to-pdf
plugins.description: Convert a markdown file containing mermaid diagrams to PDF. Renders all mermaid code blocks to SVGs, produces a rendered markdown file, then converts to PDF.

plugins.name: new-aspire-project
plugins.description: Bootstrap a new .NET Aspire project from a clean-architecture / CQRS template — copies the template, renames namespaces, configures the database, and builds.

plugins.name: bake-to-completion
plugins.description: Interview-driven skill that takes a half-baked software/product idea and strengthens every aspect of it, then hands off a clean brief to design and planning.

plugins.name: anvil
plugins.description: Native effectiveness evals & improvement loop for Claude Code skills, subagents & plugins — generate balanced test data, run in-session A/B trials on your subscription, score activation / quality-delta / cost with confidence intervals, and propose improvements.
